mnemonics.title: Permission Bits Values
mnemonics.content: Read Write Execute - Remember as R-W-X with values 4-2-1 (R=4, W=2, X=1)

mnemonics.title: Directory Structure Types
mnemonics.content: Single, Two, Tree, Acyclic, General - Remember as STTAG (Simple To Tree Acyclic General) in order of complexity
